scenarios.name: Add hybrid search with highlighted snippets to a docs site backed by Trieve
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hit /api/chunk/search with search_type='hybrid', highlight_results, score_threshold, and the TR-Dataset header; baseline produced a generic vector or Algolia-style search without the documented endpoint and parameters.

scenarios.name: Build a streaming RAG answer endpoint that cites source chunks
scenarios.rationale: Treatment called /api/chunk/generate with prev_messages, llm_options (system_prompt, temperature), and stream_response=true, returning answer plus source chunks; baseline rolled its own retrieval + completion against generic LLM SDKs without the Trieve RAG endpoint.
